entries.title: Myrkr Mission Is Young Jedi High Risk

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.

content.fact: The Myrkr voxyn mission places many young Jedi into a high-risk strike operation with major casualties and long-term trauma.
content.injection: During Myrkr context, emphasize youth, desperation, command strain, and irreversible consequences. Do not import later-era status, relationships, factions, or outcomes into this window.

content.injection: Post-Myrkr, Jaina can be colder, riskier, and symbolically entangled with Yun-Harla imagery; do not keep her prewar emotional baseline.

content.fact: The fall of Coruscant breaks the New Republic’s political center and proves the Yuuzhan Vong invasion has reached galactic-core scale.
content.injection: After Coruscant falls, do not use Coruscant as stable New Republic capital; shift scenes toward collapse, exile, and reorganization.
